name: Project-Informed Portfolio 50
description: Project-informed run grounded in Forge Engine, PARAGON, REALM, SAMAEL, AGON/The Escape, and Roviq Game Studio local docs.

segments.name: Randy Founder Fit
pains: wants taste and systems to become one stack

segments.name: AGON Members
pains: needs ritual accountability and durable identity

ideas.name: FORGE GAME
ideas.summary: Prompt-to-playable native iOS game maker built on Forge's C++20 runtime, Swift gameplay/editor layer, direct Metal renderer, haptics/audio feedback stack, replay/debug hooks, and AI patch-review control plane.

ideas.name: PARAGON VANGUARD ALPHA
ideas.summary: Mobile MMO superhero closed alpha with VANGUARD as the first playable faction, Public Trust, Court of Named People, identity exposure, rooftop arrival combat, civilian triage, and prestige drama as differentiation.

ideas.name: REALM VHAEGOR PROOF
ideas.summary: Ship the Phase 1 dragon proof path: egg discovery, hatching ritual, dragonrider bond, Dragon POV short session, battlefield consequence, and Vhaegor the Storm-Bringer as the named dragon target.

ideas.name: SAMAEL BREACH ZERO
ideas.summary: Facility, ship, and compound rehearsal surface where evidence becomes STRATA world package, physics graph, VECTOR routes, SPECTER RF, MURMUR adversary/civilian behavior, and signed AAR.

ideas.name: AGON THE FIRST WATCH
ideas.summary: 100-man, 10-squad, 30-day Season 1 with $99 entry, Mission Card, Proof Feed, Locker Room, Captain orchestration, AGON Score, and Day-30 Pentathlon.

ideas.name: ROVIQ FORGE KIT
ideas.summary: Shared adapter layer so PARAGON and REALM consume one Forge host bridge, one scene/runtime contract, and one gameplay/asset pipeline instead of drifting app-specific bridges.

ideas.name: SAMAEL CORE SDK
ideas.summary: Public module SDK and conformance harness for physics modules, capability tokens, signed artifacts, CAL declarations, and third-party module trust classes.

ideas.name: PARAGON SAINT CALIBER FORGE SLICE
ideas.summary: First real Forge/Metal gameplay proof using Saint Caliber rooftop arrival, power configuration, combat HUD, hit feedback, and app-to-engine bridge.

ideas.name: REALM COURT AND WHISPERS
ideas.summary: Dense iOS strategy surface around Court of Named People, Loyalty/Honor/Ambition/Grudge, raven intel, planted deception, oath witnesses, succession threats, and hidden political state.

ideas.name: AGON CAPTAIN OS
ideas.summary: Standalone operator/coach AI that runs recurring groups, posts daily check-ins, weekly recaps, mission previews, proof acknowledgments, quiet-member nudges, and leaderboard drops.

ideas.name: AGON COUNCIL API
ideas.summary: Seven archetypal AAR voices with strict 5-part format, lineage-grounded citations, operator review flow, and the clean Captain-versus-Council separation.

ideas.name: FORGE PREMIUM FEEL LAB
ideas.summary: Tooling and runtime assets for hit confirm, whiff, dodge, hurt, enemy windup, ambience, music state, haptic timing, thermal degradation, and content-backed feel diagnostics.

ideas.name: PARAGON IDENTITY INTEL
ideas.summary: Superhero cover/exposure layer with secret identities, institutional surveillance, doxxing risk, faction intel, public trust cascades, and player-visible consequences.

ideas.name: REALM DANCE OF THE REALM
ideas.summary: Monthly server-defining weekend event with cross-covenant teleports, scoring war, respite, retribution, cross-server invasions, and chronicles generated inside the game.

ideas.name: SAMAEL BRANCHPOINT
ideas.summary: Composure-sim productized as SAMAEL's Monte Carlo branch engine for scenario branching, counterfactual forks, sweeps, sensitivity, and signed replayable mission outcomes.

ideas.name: THE ANNUAL BOOK
ideas.summary: Physical AGON cohort archive with verified missions, squad stats, founder letters, member pages, Pentathlon scorecards, and artifact economy.

ideas.name: PARAGON CRISIS CYCLE
ideas.summary: Server-level superhero event architecture for Tier-0 emergence, faction war declaration, public trust collapse, power decay crisis, and cinematic consequences.

ideas.name: REALM DAILY RAVEN
ideas.summary: In-world procedural newspaper and chronicle that turns oaths, battles, betrayals, dragon sightings, marriages, and court deaths into daily server storytelling.

ideas.name: SAMAEL ACCURACY LEDGER
ideas.summary: Signed provenance chain for world packages, geometry, material claims, route confidence, scenario lineage, and AAR auditability.

ideas.name: FORGE EDITOR DESKTOP
ideas.summary: Swift editor workflow with document model, command system, undo/redo, hierarchy, inspector, viewport, console shell, and on-device game tuning.

ideas.name: PARAGON SAFETY CHARTER OS
ideas.summary: Moderation and safety operations product for voice, Chronicles, suicide-content escalation, doxxing, faction abuse, appeals, and solo-beta policy enforcement.

ideas.name: REALM WAR ROOM VOICE
ideas.summary: Built-in alliance/covenant voice, live march overlays, context-tagged battle calls, rally formation, theater map, and replayable coordination history.

ideas.name: SAMAEL STRATA FORGE
ideas.summary: World-building subsystem that ingests documents, scans, manual edits, and sensor hints, reconciles conflicts, records ledger provenance, and emits signed mission world packages.

ideas.name: AGON PROOF FEED
ideas.summary: Receipt-only squad feed with photo, GPS, HealthKit, screenshots, 60-second voice memos, structural proof checks, and no performative public feed.

ideas.name: ROVIQ STUDIO STACK
ideas.summary: License Forge, Airspace, Sentinel, and Composure as a small-studio tech stack for systems-deep narrative games with AI-native asset and cinematic pipelines.

ideas.name: PARAGON SIX FACTION SIM
ideas.summary: Original superhero universe with VANGUARD, SANCTUARY, DEPARTMENT 9, UNDERGROUND, OBSIDIAN, and HALCYON, each with a distinct moral compromise and gameplay loop.

ideas.name: REALM FAMILY CRYPT
ideas.summary: Procedural multi-generational memory surface where dead named characters, family lineage, oaths, betrayals, and dragon records accumulate as permanent prestige.

ideas.name: AGON PENTATHLON LIVE
ideas.summary: Regional or synchronized Day-30 competition with bodyweight gauntlet, puzzle gauntlet, Lichess bracket, cold exposure cap, squad service hour, and founders patch.

ideas.name: SAMAEL FLIGHT OMEN
ideas.summary: Aviation cockpit surface for tactical moving map, DDIL resilience, route preservation, aircraft authority under disconnect, and existing DIU OMEN pursuit.

ideas.name: FORGE AI CONTROL PLANE
ideas.summary: Context engine, structured tools, patch routing, review loops, provider adapters, Meshy orchestration, and AI-services integration for engine development.

ideas.name: PARAGON EVENT FEED CHRONICLES
ideas.summary: Server narrative voice that turns player actions, faction politics, deaths, investigations, and crises into authored-feeling live history.

ideas.name: REALM MANDATE ENGINE
ideas.summary: Mechanics-as-morality system with Mandate of Heaven, Spirit Ward, Composure Curve, Oathbreaker penalties, anti-whale constraints, and attacker viability.

ideas.name: SAMAEL RANGE LIVE
ideas.summary: Directed-energy test environment for beam path simulation, thermal coupling, atmospheric turbulence, safety envelopes, and post-test analysis.

ideas.name: AGON ORDER
ideas.summary: Long-arc post-cohort identity layer with stages, Naming Day, Annual Book, founder artifacts, and multi-season membership continuity.

ideas.name: PARAGON POWER DECAY
ideas.summary: Superhero power-cost system where abilities decay, public trust changes, corporate contracts bite, and player choices become moral liabilities.

ideas.name: REALM DRAGON POV
ideas.summary: Forge full-scene 3D flight at 60fps with bond state, dragon mood, abilities, battlefield relevance, and marquee technical flex.

ideas.name: SAMAEL SPECTER CONSOLE
ideas.summary: RF, spectrum, EW, emissions, propagation, jamming, geolocation, and pattern-of-life module as an operator-facing rehearsal view.

ideas.name: FORGE APPSTORE FACTORY
ideas.summary: Apple build/sign/deploy/archive/upload pipeline, runtime diagnostics, release evidence, device profiling, and App Store copy/assets for generated games.

ideas.name: PARAGON COURT OF NAMED PEOPLE
ideas.summary: Character system where every hero, asset, whistleblower, senator, or villain has Loyalty, Honor, Trait, Ambition, Grudge, leverage, and permanent death.

ideas.name: REALM OATH DIPLOMACY
ideas.summary: Formal treaty surface with oath proposals, witnesses, expiration, visible break costs, faith implications, house standing, and betrayal consequences.

ideas.name: AGON FATHERS
ideas.summary: 90-day cohort for new dads using AGON's Captain, Proof Feed, Brotherhood scoring, daily micro-missions, and sober operator tone.

ideas.name: SAMAEL VECTOR ROUTES
ideas.summary: Movement, exposure profile, timing distribution, deconfliction, route confidence, and cost-surface module for facilities, airspace, and range domains.

ideas.name: PARAGON WAR ROOM VOICE
ideas.summary: Faction coordination surface for voice, influence nodes, skirmish UI, crisis-cycle planning, alliances, and daily intel pulls.

ideas.name: REALM MAESTER LIBRARY
ideas.summary: Research, lore, raven cages, Dragonlore/Faithlore trees, candle-lit living scene, and knowledge-of-power progression.

ideas.name: FORGE GAME FEEL BENCHMARK
ideas.summary: Public benchmark suite showing native iOS motion, controls, haptics, thermal truth, draw-call residency, and repeated-entity scale.

ideas.name: AGON ATLAS
ideas.summary: Slow canon platform for reading, listening, watching, cohort-visible marginalia, Daily Passage, and serious anti-TikTok taste formation.

ideas.name: SAMAEL MURMUR LAB
ideas.summary: Synthetic adversary, civilian panic/cooperation, sensor failure, and behavior modeling module for mission rehearsal and disaster/crisis simulation.

ideas.name: PARAGON PRESTIGE EPISODES
ideas.summary: AI-cinematic weekly episodes where VANGUARD/HALCYON/UNDERGROUND events drive faction state and players see their server's story dramatized.

ideas.name: REALM COVENANT OS
ideas.summary: 4-tier covenant hierarchy with shared buildings, seasonal prestige, daimyo/generals/officers/vassals, help loops, and visible oath culture.

ideas.name: THE ROVIQ UNIVERSE
ideas.summary: A connected house of PARAGON, REALM, AGON, SAMAEL, Forge, Airspace, Sentinel, and Composure with one recognizable taste and reusable systems.

evidence.note: Recent active repos show unusually high existing asset density around Forge, PARAGON, REALM, SAMAEL, and AGON.
Several candidates already have screen tickets, architecture docs, runtime surfaces, or working crates.
World, cohort, replay, and chronicle loops are stronger than one-shot novelty loops.
Defense and MMO ideas have high ambition and procurement/community risk despite stronger moat.
